subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath manifested Himself in truth and through His sovereignty hath revealed whatsoever He willeth. Verily, He is the One foretold by the Messengers in their Books [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی ظهر بالحق و اظهر بسلطانه ما اراد و انه لهو الذی اخبر به الرسل فی کتب
subcodes.subjects: @return of the Manifestations of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity
